sections.title: Course introduction and philosophy of education

processing_notes: Section 1 covers the full content of the available transcript (Tom's portion of the introductory lecture, before handoff to Dr. Belmare). Single-section processing for this submission. Subsequent sections (Belmare's portion, if continued in this video) would be processed in further passes. Tom's mid-lecture handoff occurs at approximately 28:35, where he says 'Take wow anyway' as a transition cue.
